Shares [N Corp.] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.

core_idea: N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist / Support — **Bleed** stacker — build Potency and Count on one target, then spike with **Awe, Contempt** once threshold skills unlock full damage. Scaling conditions: Base Power +1 per 3 Poise (max +2). Support passive (**It flows and cries**) keys off **deployment order** — set your main carry as #1 deployed before the fight.
playstyle_guide:
- **It flows and cries** watches the **#1 deployed ally** — arrange the dashboard so the intended carry is first in line.
- **Bleed** punishes aggression — each coin flip on a Bleeding target deals Potency damage and consumes Count.
- Reach **?+ Bleed** before firing **Awe, Contempt**; many skills add Coin Power or damage per Bleed stack on target.
- Layer **Tremor Potency and Count** on the main target — Tremor fuels stagger breaks and Burst triggers.
- At **3+ Tremor**, commit **Awe, Contempt** or Burst coins for maximum Stagger Threshold pressure.
- Trigger **Tremor Burst** on stagger setups — Burst raises Stagger Threshold by Tremor Potency before Count decays.
- Kit uses **Tremor — Hemorrhage** — keep the same unique Tremor subtype on one target for Amplitude Conversion and Burst payoffs.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: Base Power +1 per 3 Poise (max +2).
- Hold S3 for when At 7+ (sum of Gaze (Ryoshu) on all enemies) is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Contemptuous Thing** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- If target has Gaze (Ryoshu) or Contempt (Ryoshu), Clash Power +1; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 6 (Bleed + Tremor) on target (max 2)
- Inflict +1 Tremor Count; [On Hit] Inflict +1 Bleed Count

**S2 — Be Awed** (BP 4, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- If target has Gaze (Ryoshu) or Contempt (Ryoshu), Clash Power +1; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 6 (Bleed + Tremor) on target (max 2)

**S3 — Awe, Contempt** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average).
- Peak output requires both conditions: If target has Gaze (Ryoshu), this Skill inflicts +2 more Bleed and Tremor potency | [Before Use] At 7+ (sum of Gaze (Ryoshu) on all enemies), or at 1+ (sum of Contempt (Ryoshu) on all enemies), activates 'Cascading Gaze of Awe Underneath Contempt' instead.
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- triggers Amplitude Conversion into Tremor — Scorch
- Inflict +1 Tremor Count; [On Hit] Inflict +1 Bleed Count

*↳ Alternate S3 — Cascading Gaze of Awe Underneath Contempt* (BP 14, CP +14): rolls — low 14, high 28 (Extremely High).
  - Unbreakable Coin

**S4 — I Shall Fire / Anytime** (BP 4, CP +7, x2): rolls — low 4, high 18 (Average).
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition

Combat passive — **Grasp that Forbids Falling**: When Staggered, gain 4 Protection and gain Contempt of the Gaze next turn (once per Encounter).
  - On death, apply the following effects against 3 enemies that have the most Gaze (Ryoshu) or Contempt (Ryoshu) (in descending order.
  - in Focused Encounters, Parts).

Combat passive — **@#$'s Hand I Let Slip**: On Hit against enemies, inflict 2 Gaze (Ryoshu) (once per turn per enemy).
  - If this unit has Gaze of Contempt, inflict +1 more Gaze (Ryoshu).
  - When hit by an enemy, inflict 1 Gaze (Ryoshu) against the attacker (once per Skill.

Defense skill — **Counter: To Grasp**: [Combat Start] If this unit does not have Contempt of the Gaze, and at 7+ (sum of Gaze (Ryoshu) on all enemies) or 1+ (sum of Contempt (Ryoshu) on….
  - [On Use] If this unit has Contempt of the Gaze, Final Power +10.
  - [On Use] When hit while using this Skill, inflict +1 Bleed Count against the attacker (3 times per turn).
team_suggestions: Uses unique Tremor (Tremor — Hemorrhage) — prioritize teammates who apply the same Tremor subtype so Amplitude Conversion and Burst effects stack on one target. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available. The support passive also benefits teammates directly — consider this identity even in compositions where it is not the primary damage dealer.
- **LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
- **Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
- **Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
